
Life History {data-navmenu="Model"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Weight at Age

```{r waa_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$weight_at_age)}
waa <- mv$weight_at_age
sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = unique(waa$sex))
p <- plot_ly()
for (sx in unique(waa$sex)) {
  sub <- waa[waa$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x = sub$age, y = sub$est,
    name = sx,
    line = list(color = sc[sx], width = 2),
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      sx, " age %{x}: %{y:.3g} kg<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Age"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Weight (kg)"
lay$title <- "Weight at Age"
lay$showlegend <- TRUE
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Length at Age

```{r laa_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$length_at_age)}
laa <- mv$length_at_age
sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = unique(laa$sex))
p <- plot_ly()
for (sx in unique(laa$sex)) {
  sub <- laa[laa$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x = sub$age, y = sub$est,
    name = sx,
    line = list(color = sc[sx], width = 2),
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      sx, " age %{x}: %{y:.1f} cm<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
}
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Age"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Length (cm)"
lay$title <- "Length at Age"
lay$showlegend <- TRUE
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Length-at-Age Distributions

```{r prob_len_age, eval=!is.null(mv$age_length_key) && (is.null(meta$model_type) || meta$model_type != "siscaL")}
tab_title <- if (!is.null(meta$model_type) && meta$model_type == "siscaL")
               "Growth Transition Matrix" else "Length-at-Age Distributions"
alk <- mv$age_length_key
sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = sexes)

plot_list <- list()
for (sx in sexes) {
  sub <- alk[alk$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(sub) == 0) next

  # Heatmap of P(length | age)
  alk_ages <- sort(unique(sub$age))
  alk_lens <- sort(unique(sub$length))
  mat <- matrix(
    data = 0, nrow = length(alk_lens),
    ncol = length(alk_ages)
  )
  for (r in seq_len(nrow(sub))) {
    ri <- match(x = sub$length[r], table = alk_lens)
    ci <- match(x = sub$age[r], table = alk_ages)
    if (!is.na(ri) && !is.na(ci)) {
      mat[ri, ci] <- sub$est[r]
    }
  }

  p <- plot_ly(
    x = alk_ages, y = alk_lens, z = mat,
    type = "heatmap",
    colorscale = "Viridis",
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      "Age: %{x}<br>Len: %{y}<br>",
      "P: %{z:.4f}<extra></extra>"
    )
  )
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = sx))
  lay$xaxis$title <- "Age"
  lay$yaxis$title <- "Length"
  p <- do.call(
    what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
  )
  plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
}

if (length(plot_list) > 0) {
  p_out <- subplot(
    plot_list, nrows = 1,
    shareY = TRUE, margin = 0.05
  )
  p_out <- layout(
    p = p_out,
    title = tab_title
  )
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
}
```

### Maturity at Age

```{r maa_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$maturity_at_age)}
maa <- mv$maturity_at_age
p <- plot_ly(data = maa, x = ~age, y = ~est)
p <- add_lines(
  p = p,
  line = list(color = "#1f77b4", width = 2),
  showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = "Age %{x}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>"
)
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Age"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Proportion mature"
lay$title <- "Maturity at Age"
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Maturity at Length

```{r mal_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$maturity_at_length)}
mal <- mv$maturity_at_length
p <- plot_ly(data = mal, x = ~length, y = ~est)
p <- add_lines(
  p = p,
  line = list(color = "#1f77b4", width = 2),
  showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = "Len %{x}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>"
)
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Length"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Proportion mature"
lay$title <- "Maturity at Length"
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Weight at Length

```{r wl_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$weight_at_length)}
wl <- mv$weight_at_length
sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = unique(wl$sex))
p  <- plot_ly()
for (sx in unique(wl$sex)) {
  sub <- wl[wl$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x = sub$length, y = sub$est,
    name = sx,
    line = list(color = sc[sx], width = 2),
    hovertemplate = paste0(sx, " len %{x}: %{y:.4g}<extra></extra>")
  )
}
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Length"
lay$yaxis$title <- "Weight (kg)"
lay$title       <- "Weight at Length"
lay$showlegend  <- TRUE
p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Moulting Probability

```{r pmoult_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$moult_probability)}
pm <- mv$moult_probability
sc <- mv_sex_colours(sex_names = unique(pm$sex))
p  <- plot_ly()
for (sx in unique(pm$sex)) {
  sub <- pm[pm$sex == sx, , drop = FALSE]
  p <- add_lines(
    p = p,
    x = sub$length, y = sub$est,
    name = sx,
    line = list(color = sc[sx], width = 2),
    hovertemplate = paste0(sx, " len %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>")
  )
}
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- "Length"
lay$yaxis$title <- "P(moult)"
lay$title       <- "Moulting Probability"
lay$showlegend  <- TRUE
p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```
